title: Hyphae Protocol Surface v1
description: Contract for the memory-protocol payload emitted by `hyphae protocol` and consumed by volva to assemble the host-context prompt. Producer: hyphae/crates/hyphae-mcp/src/memory_protocol.rs. Consumer: volva/crates/volva-runtime/src/context.rs.

schema_version.description: Protocol contract version. Currently shares the value of SCOPED_IDENTITY_SCHEMA_VERSION in hyphae-core.

artifact_type.description: Discriminator identifying this payload as a memory-protocol surface.

scoped_identity.description: Session identity context. The object is always present; individual fields are optional and omitted when hyphae was invoked without project or worktree context.

scope.description: Opaque scope key derived from worktree path.

project.description: Project name. Omitted (not null) when hyphae was invoked without a project argument.

summary.description: Human-readable guidance on when to recall and store memory.

recall.description: Recall guidance. The consumer (volva) uses tools and passive_resource_uri for prompt assembly; when is producer-emitted guidance consumed by the model, not by volva.

when.description: Conditions under which to run recall. Emitted by hyphae for model consumption; volva does not parse this field.

tools.description: MCP tool names to use for recall.

passive_resource_uri.description: URI of the passive context resource for startup recall.

store.description: Store guidance. The consumer (volva) uses tool and project_topics for prompt assembly; when and shared_topics are producer-emitted guidance consumed by the model, not by volva.

when.description: Conditions under which to store a memory. Emitted by hyphae for model consumption; volva does not parse this field.

tool.description: MCP tool name for storing memories.

shared_topics.description: Cross-project shared memory topics. Emitted by hyphae for model consumption; volva does not parse this field.

resources.description: MCP resources providing memory surfaces for this host.
